$schema_note: Synthetic Sam KG-1 fixture. Mirrors graph_nodes / graph_edges from db/migrations/028_graph_nodes_edges.sql. Labels and edge_types match ADR-008 §4 lowercase enum where possible; fixture-extension labels (person, trip, photo, email_thread, transaction) are documented in db/seeds/README-vegas-kg.md. Every node and edge carries ADR-008 §4 provenance triplet (source_table, source_row_id, source_url). All UUIDs deterministic. Authored, not extracted from real user data.
